headline: Copart Director Daniel Englander Sells 80,000 Shares for $2.2 Million. Should Investors Sell Too, With the Stock Down 40%?
summary: Englander's sale reduced his equity stake by 14% through his investment entity, as Copart shares have declined 42% over the past year.
